apps.name: Clearpath Access
apps.promise: Accessibility-aware pedestrian routing with community-sourced obstacle reporting
apps.targetUser: Wheelchair or mobility-impaired pedestrian underserved by mainstream turn-by-turn apps
apps.one_sentence_promise: Accessibility-aware pedestrian routing with community-sourced obstacle reporting

apps.name: Crux Cycle
apps.promise: Structured periodization and rest-day enforcement for boulderers and route climbers
apps.targetUser: Climber managing finger-tendon load across training blocks
apps.one_sentence_promise: Structured periodization and rest-day enforcement for boulderers and route climbers

apps.name: Heartline
apps.promise: QRISK3-methodology cardiometabolic risk score with GP-visit prep sheet
apps.targetUser: Adult with family cardiac history seeking a real number, not vague anxiety
apps.one_sentence_promise: QRISK3-methodology cardiometabolic risk score with GP-visit prep sheet

apps.name: Meno Strength
apps.promise: Strength & recovery coach adapted to perimenopause/menopause physiology
apps.targetUser: 48-year-old former regular exerciser navigating hot flashes, sleep disruption, and changing recovery needs
apps.one_sentence_promise: Strength & recovery coach adapted to perimenopause/menopause physiology

apps.name: Overland Nav
apps.promise: Off-grid overlanding navigation with fuel/water/service-stop range planning and offline vector maps
apps.targetUser: Remote road-tripper/overlander planning routes with no cell signal
apps.one_sentence_promise: Off-grid overlanding navigation with fuel/water/service-stop range planning and offline vector maps

apps.name: Pillcheck
apps.promise: Medication interaction and polypharmacy-burden checker with pharmacist-visit prep
apps.targetUser: Caregiver managing a family member's 5+ prescriptions across multiple providers
apps.one_sentence_promise: Medication interaction and polypharmacy-burden checker with pharmacist-visit prep

apps.name: Postpartum Compass
apps.promise: EPDS-style perinatal mood risk screening with ongoing check-ins and real local resource connections
apps.targetUser: Pregnant or postpartum parent worried about their mood, afraid of being judged or reported
apps.mechanic: validated mood screen + longitudinal check-ins + resource connector
apps.one_sentence_promise: EPDS-style perinatal mood risk screening with ongoing check-ins and real local resource connections

apps.name: Quietroute
apps.promise: Sensory-friendly, predictable step-by-step wayfinding and transit companion
apps.targetUser: Neurodivergent or anxiety-prone traveler for whom unpredictable reroutes derail the trip
apps.one_sentence_promise: Sensory-friendly, predictable step-by-step wayfinding and transit companion

apps.name: Return To Run
apps.promise: Enforces a physio-prescribed walk-run return-to-running progression with pain-signal discipline
apps.targetUser: Runner rehabbing a stress fracture or IT band injury on a graduated return plan
apps.one_sentence_promise: Enforces a physio-prescribed walk-run return-to-running progression with pain-signal discipline
